name: ETRS89-FRA [RGF93 v2b] (lon-lat)
area: France - onshore and offshore, mainland and Corsica (France métropolitaine including Corsica).
remarks: Replaces ETRS89-FRA [RGF93 v2] (CRS code 9779) from 2021-01-05. See CRS code 9782 for system with axes in sequence lat-lon to be used for air, land and sea navigation and safety of life purposes.
